completion_promises.criterion_text: dispatch_autobuild_async(build_id, feature_id, ...) -> AutobuildDispatchHandle function exists at src/forge/pipeline/dispatchers/autobuild_async.py
completion_promises.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/dispatchers/autobuild_async.py exporting dispatch_autobuild_async(build_id, feature_id, correlation_id, *, forward_context_builder, async_task_starter, stage_log_recorder, state_channel) -> AutobuildDispatchHandle. Test TestDispatchAutobuildAsyncExists asserts the module path, file location under dispatchers/, function callability, and frozen handle dataclass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Calls ForwardContextBuilder.build_for(AUTOBUILD, build_id, feature_id) to get the approved feature-plan artefact path
completion_promises.evidence: dispatch_autobuild_async invokes forward_context_builder.build_for(stage=StageClass.AUTOBUILD, build_id=build_id, feature_id=feature_id) as the very first step (before any stage_log write). Test TestForwardContextResolution.test_calls_builder_with_autobuild_stage_and_feature_id installs a spy on builder.build_for and asserts the args are exactly {stage: AUTOBUILD, build_id, feature_id}.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Calls DeepAgents middleware start_async_task with the autobuild subagent name (autobuild_runner) and the assembled context
completion_promises.evidence: The dispatcher invokes async_task_starter.start_async_task(subagent_name=AUTOBUILD_RUNNER_NAME, context=launch_payload) where AUTOBUILD_RUNNER_NAME='autobuild_runner' and launch_payload includes build_id, feature_id, correlation_id, and serialised context_entries. TestStartAsyncTaskInvocation asserts the subagent name and the four payload fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns the assigned task_id immediately; does not await completion
completion_promises.evidence: dispatch_autobuild_async is a synchronous function that returns AutobuildDispatchHandle(task_id, ...) immediately after start_async_task returns the minted id. There is no await/poll for runner completion. TestSynchronousReturn.test_returns_handle_with_minted_task_id asserts the returned handle carries the starter-minted task_id, and TestSynchronousReturn.test_dispatch_does_not_await_runner_completion uses a non-executing starter to confirm no runner-body hook is invoked.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Initialises the async_tasks channel entry with an AutobuildState where lifecycle="starting", wave_index=0, task_index=0, correlation_id threaded
completion_promises.evidence: After start_async_task returns, the dispatcher calls state_channel.initialise_autobuild_state(build_id, feature_id, task_id, correlation_id, lifecycle=AUTOBUILD_STARTING_LIFECYCLE='starting', wave_index=0, task_index=0). TestAsyncTasksStateChannelInit.test_state_channel_entry_has_starting_lifecycle asserts every field; the correlation_id assertion is in TestCorrelationIdThreading.test_correlation_id_appears_on_state_channel_entry.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Records the autobuild dispatch as a stage_log entry in state="running" with the task_id stored in details_json
completion_promises.evidence: stage_log_recorder.record_running is called twice on the happy path: once before start_async_task with details_json {subagent, correlation_id, context_entries, task_id: None} and once after with task_id populated. The recorder is upsert-shaped on (build_id, feature_id, stage), so the live row reflects the post-dispatch row. TestStageLogRecording.test_post_dispatch_stage_log_carries_task_id asserts details_json["task_id"] equals the returned handle.task_id; test_stage_log_recorded_with_running_state_and_autobuild_stage asserts both calls target StageClass.AUTOBUILD.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two concurrent builds dispatching autobuild at the same time receive distinct task_id values (Group F @concurrency scenario)
completion_promises.evidence: TestConcurrentDispatchesGetDistinctTaskIds.test_two_concurrent_dispatches_get_distinct_task_ids spawns two threads dispatching autobuild for build-A/FEAT-A and build-B/FEAT-B against a single FakeAsyncTaskStarter (which uses a threading.Lock-guarded counter). The test asserts len(set(task_ids)) == 2 — i.e. distinct identifiers. The dispatcher itself is stateless across calls, so the only synchronisation requirement is on the AsyncTaskStarter Protocol's contract that start_async_task mints a fresh id per call.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test mocking start_async_task: successful dispatch returns task_id, state-channel populated with starting lifecycle
completion_promises.evidence: TestSynchronousReturn.test_returns_handle_with_minted_task_id and TestAsyncTasksStateChannelInit.test_state_channel_entry_has_starting_lifecycle together cover this AC: the FakeAsyncTaskStarter is the mocked middleware tool, the returned handle.task_id is asserted to be the starter-minted value (autobuild-task-0001), and the state-channel record's lifecycle is asserted to equal 'starting'.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test: two concurrent dispatches → two distinct task_id values
completion_promises.evidence: TestConcurrentDispatchesGetDistinctTaskIds.test_two_concurrent_dispatches_get_distinct_task_ids — see AC-007 evidence (this AC is the unit-test sibling of AC-007's behavioural requirement).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test: correlation_id threaded onto AutobuildState
completion_promises.evidence: TestCorrelationIdThreading.test_correlation_id_appears_on_state_channel_entry asserts state_channel.calls[0].correlation_id == 'corr-FEAT-1-2026'; TestCorrelationIdThreading.test_correlation_id_appears_in_launch_context additionally asserts the launch payload carries the same value, satisfying the wider Group I @data-integrity contract.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Files follow PEP 8, 88-char max line length, type hints throughout, snake_case for functions, PascalCase for classes, UPPER_CASE for constants (per .claude/rules/code-style.md). All 1247 forge tests pass cleanly. No new dependencies introduced. Module uses from __future__ import annotations and Protocol/dataclass patterns matching the existing pipeline modules (forward_context_builder.py, per_feature_sequencer.py).
